title: Review: secretsx codebase pre-merge
notes: Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — vault error classification bugs will silently suppress retries on transient failures; keyring error variant is wrong but unlikely to cause data loss. PKCS11 blocking I/O is a latency/correctness issue under concurrent load. Confidence: ~15% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: not having read azure-kv and gcp-sm source directly; local-signing test vectors not independently verified against a second implementation in this review. Would raise confidence if: read azure-kv and gcp-sm source; ran integration tests for keyring on macOS.
